> **This repo isn't accepting pull requests at the moment.**
>
> It's published as a reference implementation and isn't set up for review yet, so this will most likely be closed unmerged — no reflection on the change itself.
>
> **Two better routes:**
> - **Fork it** — enabled and encouraged, MIT, no attribution required.
> - **Open an issue** — Issues *are* open. Describing the change there is the fastest way to get it considered, and bug reports or results from your own Dev Hub are especially welcome.
>
> See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
